task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer list panel in LibreCAD should show three custom layers: 'FRAME' (White/Black depending on theme), 'DIMENSIONS' (Green), and 'NOTES' (Cyan).

task_completion.description: Draw the Bottom Bracket and Rear Axle circles on the FRAME layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle at the origin (0,0) representing the BB, and a smaller circle to the bottom-left (-430, -70) representing the rear axle, drawn in the FRAME layer color.

task_completion.description: Draw the connected tubes to form the frame schematic facing right
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connecting the reference points to form a standard bicycle frame shape (diamond shape with rear triangle) facing to the right, drawn in the FRAME layer color. The top right point (Head Tube Top Center) should be at coordinates (385, 590).

task_completion.description: Add dimensions for Chainstay, Head Tube length, and Head Tube angle
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension lines and text visible in Green (DIMENSIONS layer) specifically measuring the chainstay (bottom rear tube), the head tube (front short tube), and the angle of the head tube.

task_completion.description: Add the specified text to the NOTES layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'GRAVEL GEO SIZE M' is visible on the drawing canvas in Cyan (NOTES layer).

task_completion.description: Save the schematic to the correct file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar displays 'bicycle_geometry.dxf' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/bicycle_geometry.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD graphical interface to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreCAD application window with drawing tools, layer panels, and canvas being actively used, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the DXF file.

integrity.description: Layers and colors were configured within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD layer properties dialog or layer list is visible in the screenshots showing the manual setup of layers and their specific colors.

integrity.description: The agent actually drew the geometry rather than loading a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the progressive construction of the frame (e.g., drawing circles first, then adding lines, then dimensions) rather than the finished drawing appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/bicycle_geometry.dxf. The geometry must reflect: BB at (0,0), Rear Axle at (-430, -70), Head Tube Top Center at (385, 590). Layers required: 'FRAME' (White), 'DIMENSIONS' (Green), and 'NOTES' (Cyan). The notes must exactly say 'GRAVEL GEO SIZE M'.
